DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Continued To Feb-10-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Fred Feller, Esq. (510)548-7474 of BKFC for Defendant/Moving party Estate of James Gause, Deceased, Eleanor Gause

Mr. Fred Feller counsel for the Defendant reports to the Court that the case has settled. He requested that the matter is continued for parties to file a dismissal. The Court grants the request. DEFENDANT ESTATE OF JAMES GAUSE, DECEASED, ELEANOR GAUSE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
is continued to February 10, 2016. Mr. Feller to give notice to the other side. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2015 Continued To Feb-24-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-01-2015 Continued To Jan-06-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephaine Foster, Esq., (415) 835-5900 of the Hooshmand Law Group for Plaintiff/Opposing party Tanya Phillips

Ms. Foster counsel for the Plainitff informs the Court that parties are unable to apear on December 24, 2015 and have stipulated to continue the hearing date to the week of January 4-8 2016. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANTS ESTATE OF JAMES GAUSE, DECEASED and ELEANOR GAUSE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is continued to January 6, 2015 on the Courts own motion. The date set is at the request of the parties. Counsel for Plaintiff to give notice. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
